college_info.college_name: Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College goes up to 522.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College has been rated 2.6 on placements on the basis of 54 reviews done by students.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have passed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
MCA Candidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.

faqs.answer: A:    Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College offers median package range of INR 240,000 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance programme and has been rated 2.6 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.
faqs.question: What is the median package offered at Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College during placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College courses range between INR 70,000 to 1,60,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College has courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM, B.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in VLSI Design, Civil Engineering, Power Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: In our college, it is disappointing, but a few facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the highest package is 4.5 Lacs per annum to 5 Lacs per annum, and the average package is 3 Lacs per annum. The lowest package is 1.5 Lacs per annum in my college. The top recruiting companies that come to our college are normal companies like Tata Motors, Mahindra, etc. The placement percentage is 70%.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are very average. For example, Wi-Fi is not available in my branch, and there is no proper infrastructure in my labs. The classrooms and library are good in our college. There are no hostels in my college. The sports facilities are good, and the medical facilities are average in our college.

admission_process.title: Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering College considers scores in GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET for admission to specific courses.Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering Collegeoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,60,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 70,000 - 1,00,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, it is disappointing, but a few facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very average. For example, Wi-Fi is not available in my branch, and there is no proper infrastructure in my labs. The classrooms and library are good in our college. There are no hostels in my college. The sports facilities are good, and the medical facilities are average in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The good and average environment in our college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available at my college, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, are good and average. There are no hostels in my college. The sports facilities are good in our college, and the medical facilities are average in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The average package placements in our college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very average in our college. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very average, and the library is good most of the time at my college. There are no hostels in my college, and sports are good because the ground is in good condition. Medical facilities are average in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The good and average also in my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are average in our college. The Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very average, but the library is good in my college. There are no hostels in my college. There is only one canteen, and sports are very good. The medical facilities are average in our college.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, the environment is good but not placement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are very average. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are also very average, and the library is good in my college all the time. There are no hostels in my college. We only have a canteen, which is also average. Sports facilities are good, and medical facilities are average in my college.

reviews.review_heading: The dissatisfied in my college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the facilities and infrastructure available for my course include Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms that are very average. The library is good all the time. There are no hostels in my college. Sports facilities are good in our college, and the canteen is average. Medical facilities are also average in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are very average, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, etc. The sports facilities are good because our ground is nice, and there are no hostels in my college. Only the canteen and medical facilities are average in our college.

reviews.review_heading: There are average placements in our college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the course in our college are very average in terms of Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms, while the library is good. There are no hostels in our college, and sports facilities are good, but medical facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: The college overall feels disappointing and good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, classrooms, etc. The quality of food is average, and our college basically has no hostels. Only a canteen is available. The games facilities are good, and the medical facilities are very average at my college.

reviews.review_heading: This college has the best teachers who help everyone.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the facilities are very good, and the labs are very neat and very clean. The classroom is very clean, and the quality of the food is much better in this college. The canteen food is very tasty and the medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: In our college is a decent and good placements and scope for improvement.
reviews.review_text: In our college, infrastructure is average and decent but has scope for improvement. Our classrooms and labs are very average in maintenance. Some labs are average for teaching. There are no hostels in our college. Medical facilities are average, and games and sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is average for academics and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is very average but functional, our college classrooms are spacious, and the college provides normal facilities like computers, a library, labs and a seminar hall. Some labs are average, though a few need updating. In our college, there are no hostels. Our college sports and games are good because of the good ground.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has decent and average placements, but average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: My college's infrastructure is average compared to other engineering colleges in Visakhapatnam. Classrooms are average in our college, with only a few classrooms better, like the projector room. Labs have the necessary equipment, though some systems are outdated and need upgrades. The Wi-Fi connectivity on campus is manageable and only for staff rooms, but not very fast. There are no hostels in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are very good in this college, and I love them.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course and the hostel is very good at the college. The facilities in our college are better. Classrooms are very clean. The library is very peaceful to read in and the canteen food is the best.

reviews.review_heading: This is the average college in terms of teaching and placements.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are no hostels, and also the canteen is very average too, and the classrooms and library are good, but the labs are average, and maintenance is very poor in our college. Medical facilities are good, but there are times in our college. My college sports and games are good because our grounds are very good.

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Vemu Institute of Technology admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Vemu Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Vemu Institute of Technology is around INR 61000 - INR 172000.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 454 students were admitted at Vemu Institute of Technology and 263 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 263 students 243 were placed with median salary of INR 350000 and 15 students opted for higher studies. A total of 431 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Vemu Institute of Technologyand 361 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 361 students 341 were placed with median salary of INR 372000 and 17 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 186 students were admitted at Vemu Institute of Technology and 82 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 82 students 36 were placed with median salary of INR 325000. A total of 52 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Vemu Institute of Technologyand 42 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 42 students 29 were placed with median salary of INR 372000.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Vemu Institute of Technology?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Vemu Institute of Technology offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The Vemu Institute of Technology course fee ranges between INR 70,000 to 1,60,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Best future in our college.

review_content.Placements: My college students placed in my course is 94%. The maximum salary is 10 LPA. The minimum salary is 5 LPA. Top recruiting company is Accenture. 90% of students got internships from Roman Technologies. Development assistant director at a premier institute of professional education providing a dynamic and vibrant force.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, Wi-Fi connection is available in all departments. Labs are available in all departments. Total more than 300 classes are there. There is a central library for all departments and a separate library is there for all departments. Good facilities in hostels on college campus. Separate canteen is there for both boys and girls. Sports connected in Kelo Vemu day.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college does not provide placements for diploma students dissatisfied.

review_content.Placements: There are 70% of students in this Diploma in Mechanical Engineering course. There is no placement for Diploma students in this college. Almost 90% of students got internships in this course in companies like Amaraja, Kia, and Vikarm Solar. The roles offered in an internship are machine operator, and quality control.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is fantastic. There are a total of 5 blocks in the college. There is no Wi-Fi available. Labs are also available in good condition. Classrooms are perfect. There is a library also. The quality of food in a hostel is not bad and not even good. Just okay on some days, The Hostel rooms are not that clean, there is a common bathroom in a hostel, And there are 3 canteens available. Medical facilities are also available. 2 grounds are there one for football and the other for all the games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I was very satisfied for joining in this college.

review_content.Placements: To look for 100% employment for all students. To recognize the core competencies of the students. To train the students to meet the expectations of the industry through our Career Development Programmes. To build confidence in students and develop the right attitude in them and to enhance their communication, technical, analytical, and logical skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is good by the campus, and the canteen is provided, and only some are difficult to travel; remaining all are good in this college. All the facilities are available in our college, like Wi-Fi, a library with all the books, and every classroom has projectors.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Value for money and worth.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 70 percent of my seniors are placed in different companies. The highest package offered in my course is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCL, Wipro, and HCL. About 40 percent of students got internships in Wipro. The top roles offered in my course are design engineer and manufacturer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, my faculty are knowledgeable and teach new techniques for solving problems. We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities. In my hostel, the food is very good, and medical facilities are good. The maintenance of my college is very good. We also have a sports period.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and a challenging atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90 percent of students from my course are being placed every year. The highest package is 12,00,000, the average is 7,00,000, and the lowest is 3,00,000. The companies that are recruiting are Capgemini, Accenture, and Infosys. The top roles are software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for our department include a library, laboratory, projector, seminar halls, indoor games room, and Wi-Fi. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is equal, and the menu is simple, containing basic South Indian dishes. We also have a ground for various sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Very nice college, good infrastructure and peaceful nature and will get placed in college itself.

review_content.Placements: Every year, out of 500 students, 450 will definitely get placed. The highest package that Vemu Institute has received so far is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, Mindtree, etc. A large number of students secure internships every year in various companies like Accenture, Excel, Skill Desire, and more. Common roles offered are Front-end Developer, Assistant Manager, Intern, Software Engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: When it comes to infrastructure, Vemu Institute has a good setup. They provide different labs for each subject. For example, if we have a Java lab, there is a separate lab dedicated solely to Java programming. These labs are equipped with good Wi-Fi connections to avoid internet fluctuations. Beyond academics, we have sports hours, and the campus includes a huge ground with a basketball court, shuttle court, and cricket ground. The hostel mess is also quite good; they provide a very spacious dining room that can accommodate more than 500 students at a time. The hostel food is also good.

individual_reviews.title: The college does not provide placements for diploma students dissatisfied.

content.Placements: There are 70% of students in this Diploma in Mechanical Engineering course. There is no placement for Diploma students in this college. Almost 90% of students got internships in this course in companies like Amaraja, Kia, and Vikarm Solar. The roles offered in an internship are machine operator, and quality control.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is fantastic. There are a total of 5 blocks in the college. There is no Wi-Fi available. Labs are also available in good condition. Classrooms are perfect. There is a library also. The quality of food in a hostel is not bad and not even good. Just okay on some days, The Hostel rooms are not that clean, there is a common bathroom in a hostel, And there are 3 canteens available. Medical facilities are also available. 2 grounds are there one for football and the other for all the games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I was very satisfied for joining in this college.

content.Placements: To look for 100% employment for all students. To recognize the core competencies of the students. To train the students to meet the expectations of the industry through our Career Development Programmes. To build confidence in students and develop the right attitude in them and to enhance their communication, technical, analytical, and logical skills.
content.Infrastructure: The library is good by the campus, and the canteen is provided, and only some are difficult to travel; remaining all are good in this college. All the facilities are available in our college, like Wi-Fi, a library with all the books, and every classroom has projectors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Value for money and worth.

content.Placements: Nearly 70 percent of my seniors are placed in different companies. The highest package offered in my course is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCL, Wipro, and HCL. About 40 percent of students got internships in Wipro. The top roles offered in my course are design engineer and manufacturer.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, my faculty are knowledgeable and teach new techniques for solving problems. We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities. In my hostel, the food is very good, and medical facilities are good. The maintenance of my college is very good. We also have a sports period.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and a challenging atmosphere.

content.Placements: Almost 90 percent of students from my course are being placed every year. The highest package is 12,00,000, the average is 7,00,000, and the lowest is 3,00,000. The companies that are recruiting are Capgemini, Accenture, and Infosys. The top roles are software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for our department include a library, laboratory, projector, seminar halls, indoor games room, and Wi-Fi. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is equal, and the menu is simple, containing basic South Indian dishes. We also have a ground for various sports.

paragraphs: Vemu Institute of Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.Vemu Institute of Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET. Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

The classrooms are hygienic and the campus does maintain cleanliness. 
The hostel provides above-average food and the medical facilities are fine here. Since my first year, I have never been to any sports events.

The college has a required number of labs and classrooms and has all the books required for students in the library. The network speeds in labs are very high. A medical facility is always available. Every year, sports are conducted, and weekly games and PT periods are also provided.

.

The quality of the facilities was too good in our hostel, as was the food.

review_content.General: Wi-Fi is available in college only, not in the hostel. Labs are also well maintained in cleaning. There are workshops in college available for all branch students, but there are some shortages of equipment in labs, like a drafter, that are not present, but overall average. All facilities teachers are good in behavior and cooperative towards studies. Yes, there is a well-mentioned canteen present in the college. According to my friends, the mess food is quite good compared to other college's mess food.

reviews_list.review_title: The fees only 40000 a year. So if you live near Rewari. You should give it a try.

review_content.Placements: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology is situated in Rewari, Haryana. The campus is quite big, but there is not much to offer in terms of placements. They don't have many internship opportunities, and the best they offer is ₹25,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus of the college was quite big. Hostels are available, and the environment was clean. The hostel rent is ₹6,000 per semester. The mess charge is around ₹2,500, but the food was the worst. The campus Wi-Fi is good, and the staff was okay. The computers that are there are old.

faqs.answer: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a four-year full-time BTech course in the stream of Engineering. The offered specialisations are inclusive of Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.Apart from this, RBSSIET also offers a BTech (Lateral Entry) course that lasts three years in the common BTech specialisations.
faqs.question: Q: What kind of courses does Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology offer for students?

faqs.answer: Direct admission to a full-time UG programme of BTech is not valid at Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology. The college admits students to its BTech programme based on a valid JEE Main score. However, candidates can apply for direct admission to the second year of BTech through Lateral Entry.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A full-time BTech programme at Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology lasts for four years. The tuition fee for all BTech specialisations is INR 1.2 lakh. There might be other components inclusive in the total course fee apart from the tuition fees.
faqs.question: Q: What is the fee structure for B.Tech at Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology offers BTech course in a full-time mode. Admission to this course is entirely entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on their past academic merit and scores obtained in JEE Main entrance exam. To be eligible for the programme, candidates must passed Class 12 with PCM/ PCB from a recognised board.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities at RBSSIET are reported to be 30 to 40%. Some students have obtained internships, though these are relatively limited. However, several students mentioned that there is no placement in this college. Students of known IT branches report a lack of placement opportunities. Placement drives are often described as inconsistent, with fewer high-level profile companies. Top recruiters include Infosys and Wipro, offering 2,00,000 to 6,00,000 rupees, with branches like Computer Science and IT, such as AI.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel is good for the environment, with a park in the college hostel and also a badminton court inside the hostel. A gym is also available. The common room has a TV. The food is average, I’m not saying it’s good. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and average studies.

content.Placements: Around 30 percent of students are placed in average companies. The lowest package was 2 LPA, and the highest was 4 LPA. There are some local companies in Gurugram and Manesar. Around 20 percent of students got internships, mostly from the CSC department; internships are in local companies. There are many branches in college, like mechanical, computer science engineering, civil, ECE, and electrical, which is a newly introduced branch.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in college only, not in the hostel. Labs are also well maintained in cleaning. There are workshops in college available for all branch students, but there are some shortages of equipment in labs, like a drafter, that are not present, but overall average. All facilities teachers are good in behavior and cooperative towards studies. Yes, there is a well-mentioned canteen present in the college. According to my friends, the mess food is quite good compared to other college's mess food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The fees only 40000 a year. So if you live near Rewari. You should give it a try.

content.Placements: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology is situated in Rewari, Haryana. The campus is quite big, but there is not much to offer in terms of placements. They don't have many internship opportunities, and the best they offer is ₹25,000.
content.Infrastructure: The campus of the college was quite big. Hostels are available, and the environment was clean. The hostel rent is ₹6,000 per semester. The mess charge is around ₹2,500, but the food was the worst. The campus Wi-Fi is good, and the staff was okay. The computers that are there are old.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: B.Tech is not easy but it teaches you various lessons.

content.Placements: Recently there have been no placements in CSE but in the civil branch, there are some placements. This college is newly built. Various B.Tech course is offered by this college and about internships I don’t have any idea. The highest package is about 4 to 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure plays a very vital role in the development of students with labs, classrooms etc. The college is on 40 acres. Various facilities are also available such as scholarships for both girls and boys in various domains.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. Almost 70% of students got internships from our college. Top recruiting companies are Infosys and Dafodill. A few students pass exams.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our department is good. The first pass-out batch was in 2021. The Wi-Fi facility is good. Classrooms are neat. The infrastructure of the hostel is good. The food served in the hostel is not good. They provide sports facilities.

admission_process.title: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in ISC, CBSE 12th, and HBSE 12th, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG levels in several specialisations.Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers B.E. / B.Tech at UG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,20,000.

A total of 330 seats are available for this programme. Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology offers B.E. / B.Tech in specialisations, such as Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering and more. Check the following information to know the eligibility, accepted entrance exam, fee and seats of the Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology B.E. / B.Tech programme:

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for B.Tech at Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology offers BTech course in a full-time mode. Admission to this course is entirely entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on their past academic merit and scores obtained in JEE Main entrance exam. To be eligible for the programme, candidates must passed Class 12 with PCM/ PCB from a recognised board.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Tech at Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: A full-time BTech programme at Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology lasts for four years. The tuition fee for all BTech specialisations isINR 1.2 lakh.There might be other components inclusive in the total course fee apart from the tuition fees.

faqs.question: Which B.Tech specialisation does Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology offer?
faqs.answer: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a full-time BTech programme across six specialisations. Candidates are offered admission to these courses based on their JEE Main score. Listed below are all the BTech specialisations offered at RBSSIET:Civil EngineeringComputer Science Engineering (CSE)CSE (Data Science)Electrical EngineeringElectronics & Communication EngineeringMechanical Engineering

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Direct admission to a full-time UG programme of BTech is not valid at Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology. The college admits students to its BTech programme based on a valid JEE Main score. However, candidates can apply for direct admission to the second year of BTech through Lateral Entry.

faqs.question: How to get admission to Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions are entirely entrance-based. Candidates are offered admission based on their past academic merit and scores obtained in the relevant entrance exams. Further, eligible candidates can apply online at (techadmissionshry.gov.in) for their desired programme. The final seat allotment is done based on a two-round centralised counselling process.

faqs.question: Who can apply for admission to Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions are offered to BTech and BTech (LE) courses. The duration of these courses is four and three years, respectively. Check below the course-wise eligibility criteria for admission to RBSSIET courses:Course NameEligibilityBTechPass Class 12 with PCM/ PCB from a recognised boardBTech (LE)Pass Diploma/ BSc with minimum 45% aggregate

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel is good for the environment, with a park in the college hostel and also a badminton court inside the hostel. A gym is also available. The common room has a TV. The food is average, I’m not saying it’s good. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in college only, not in the hostel. Labs are also well maintained in cleaning. There are workshops in college available for all branch students, but there are some shortages of equipment in labs, like a drafter, that are not present, but overall average. All facilities teachers are good in behavior and cooperative towards studies. Yes, there is a well-mentioned canteen present in the college. According to my friends, the mess food is quite good compared to other college's mess...

reviews.review_heading: The fees only 40000 a year. So if you live near Rewari. You should give it a try.
reviews.review_text: The campus of the college was quite big. Hostels are available, and the environment was clean. The hostel rent is ₹6,000 per semester. The mess charge is around ₹2,500, but the food was the worst. The campus Wi-Fi is good, and the staff was okay. The computers that are there are old.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech is not easy but it teaches you various lessons.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure plays a very vital role in the development of students with labs, classrooms etc. The college is on 40 acres. Various facilities are also available such as scholarships for both girls and boys in various domains.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is good. The first pass-out batch was in 2021. The Wi-Fi facility is good. Classrooms are neat. The infrastructure of the hostel is good. The food served in the hostel is not good. They provide sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rao Birender Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Our college provides a hostel for boys. There is no canteen on campus. The canteen is not open. The hostel rooms are good. There is a water and electricity problem sometimes. Classrooms and Wi-Fi are good. The computer labs are hardly working. There is no generator in our college.

reviews.review_heading: This is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is well developed. We have a few air-conditioned classrooms as well as labs and a large library. There is a boys' hostel. It is well maintained. It is surrounded by a park, so we always get fresh air. It is clean. For girls, PGs are available.

reviews.review_heading: There is very good infrastructure and facilities like library.
reviews.review_text: This college has very good facilities like hostel, library, labs and classroom. There is atmosphere which everyone will like. The quality of the food available in hostel is very good. But there is no events happening in this college like sports events, fest.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled with decent speed. The infrastructure is average. We do not have many facilities in our college. Laboratory is not huge in our college. Our library does not have many books, but we can get some subject-related books. Medical facilities are not available. Classrooms are spacious. The food served in the mess is average. We do not have sports and games facilities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is average in terms of infrastructure, facilities, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. But after a few years, the campus will become lush green. The campus has only one hostel building, and the others are academic blocks. There is only one corridor.

reviews.review_heading: Too much bad facilities and behavior of permanent staff.
reviews.review_text: Too much poor, electricity problem and water problem, if anything (equipment) will not work than institute will not repair. Note: There are too much fine collection by institute for no reason. Mess problem, too much bad food and not hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Everything you need to know about my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and classrooms are good. The library is fine and the hostel is pretty big as compared to the college. The hostel is 5 to 6 times bigger than our College. The hostel has started previous year and students from more than 70 kms could get into the hostel. No canteen or medical facility is available . Sports and games are not present in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is better to choose another college.
reviews.review_text: Our college is under construction. It's not completed yet only the academic building and hostels are completed. The rest of the infrastructure is under construction but the classrooms are huge and spacious. Most of the time, there is no electricity in our college, also in summer. But the college has a decent library and fast Wi-Fi. Labs are not well-equipped and the computer systems are very outdated in labs.

reviews.review_heading: It is newly established so it will take some time to build its reputation.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good but they don't easily give you the password. Wi-Fi is for students but they behave like it is their own. Labs are not worth it.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for knowledge seekers.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the facilities provided in our hostel is average. The quality of the food available in the mess and canteen is good, and medical facilities are also good. There is a huge playground for many sports and games. There is a Wi-Fi facility in the college. There are air-conditioned labs and a huge library.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) courses are offered to students in offline mode. Further, the fees structure for Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) courses stands around INR 1,00,800 to 2,74,325.

faqs.answer:
A:    Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed class 12th or equivalent by the AIU or Intermediate or 2-year Pre-University exam conducted by a recognized Board/ University with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry/Biotechnology/Biology/ Technical Vocational subject.

Candidates must have passed class 12th/equivalent examination in 2020, 2021 or appearing in 2022.
There is no age limit for the candidates.

Candidate with below mentioned eligibility are also eligible:
Final examination of the 2-year course of the Joint Services Wing of the NDA.
SSC Examination conducted by the NIOS with a minimum of 5 subjects.
A Diploma recognized by AICTE or a State board of technical education of at least 3 year duration.

2021 onwards Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU), Lucknow will be using the score sheet of JEE (Main) for admission instead of UPCET (Earlier UPSEE).

For more detail, visit - https://jeemain.nta.nic.in/eligibility-criteria/After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination with a minimum of 35% marks from a recognized board/Institute.
The minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.MBA/PGDMCandidate with grace marks are not allowed for admission.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

review_content.Placements: The placement offered in our course as of CSE and IT branch are average. The students that are placed in our college are below or less than 50% of the total students. The top recruiting companies of our college are hero honda, Infosys, Honeywell, NIIT, LG, Gate, etc. Only a few students less than 1% got internships and they get this from off campus.

overview_faqs.question: Is Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) is a reputed institute for B.Tech, After 1th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 3.9 on placements, 4.4 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Institute of Technology and Management (ITM) Aligarh.

content.Placements: The number of students placed is 574, according to the college. But the placement salaries are not more than an average of 3 LPA. However, there are certain companies visiting the college for internship programs and promotional events. So, if someone is looking at this college for placements, it might not be the right place for him/her.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are average (sometimes less than average). The computer lab has all old computers, which generally cause problems. Sometimes, the system compiler doesn't even work as desired due to the age of the system and software. There is no Wi-Fi for students' use in the college. There is no mess. There's a canteen and a decent library in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Our college has excellent placements. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA to 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. Many students get internships. Top recruiting companies like Paytm, Infosys, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Hero, etc., visit our campus. It is an excellent and well-known college in our city. There are plenty of job opportunities available.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, the library, and sports are available. The hostel facilities are not available. A mess is also not available. The quality of food in the canteen is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My opinion on ITM Aligarh.

content.Placements: The placement offered in our course as of CSE and IT branch are average. The students that are placed in our college are below or less than 50% of the total students. The highest and the lowest placements both are not very well. The highest placement of our college is not more than 3 Lacs per annum. The lowest package is also around 1.2 Lacs per annum. And the average package is below 2 Lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies of our college are hero honda, Infosys, Honeywell, NIIT, LG, Gate, etc. Only a few students less than 1% got internships and they get this from off campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything around ITM Aligarh.

content.Placements: The placement is very excellent. Around 70% students get placed in top companies. The highest package is 3 Lacs per year, the lowest package is 1lakh per year, and the average package is 1.8 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies of our college are buyju's, paytm, mahindra tech etc. No students get internship from our college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities of our college are average. The infrastructure and facilities are good. Wi-fi is also available, but labs, management, and library is are not good. The classrooms are good in our college. Hostel is not available. The canteen is also very bad. Medical facilities and sports facilities are good in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college - Institute of Technology and Management, Aligarh.

content.Placements: Placements are good. The highest package offered is 4 Lacs per year, the lowest package offered is 1 Lac per year, and the average package offered is 2 Lacs per annum. Lot of companies come to our college including hero, tcs, infosys, byjus, oracle, etc. Top roles offered in our course include web developer, database engineer, software engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities available in our college are very amazing. The college campus is good too. Facilities like wi-fi, labs, classroom, and library are provided. There is no hostel and mess facility available in our college. The canteen food is good.

paragraphs: Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) considers scores in JEE Main, CUET-PG, and JEECUP for admission to specific courses.Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh)offers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,44,800 - 2,74,325. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,28,000 - 1,33,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh)?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) goes up to 654.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Institute of Technology Management, Aligarh (ITM Aligarh) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed class 12th or equivalent by the AIU or Intermediate or 2-year Pre-University exam conducted by a recognized Board/ University with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry/Biotechnology/Biology/ Technical Vocational subject.

Candidates must have passed class 12th/equivalent examination in 2020, 2021 or appearing in 2022.
There is no age limit for the candidates.

Candidate with below mentioned eligibility are also eligible:
Final examination of the 2-year course of the Joint Services Wing of the NDA.
SSC Examination conducted by the NIOS with a minimum of 5 subjects.
A Diploma recognized by AICTE or a State board of technical education of at least 3 year duration.

2021 onwards Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU), Lucknow will be using the score sheet of JEE

reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, the library, and sports are available. The hostel facilities are not available. A mess is also not available. The quality of food in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Life of Institute of Technology & Management, Aligarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good as compared to any other college in the city. Also, the campus is too big. Lot of facilities are available in our college. There is canteen, library, wi-fi facility, sports kit, etc. Are available. The facility of hostel and mess is not available in our college because all the students who study in our college are local students or lives in the same city. Also, the all other facilities available in our college are very well and good.

reviews.review_heading: Pros and Cons : ITM, Aligarh.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are good. We have a big library in our college, a lot of computer labs, an auditorium, wi-fi facilities, etc. Also, the infrastructure of our college is moderately good. There is no mess and hostel in our college but there is a canteen in our college in which the food is awesome. The sports facilities are limited and also there is very less time to play for us.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Institute of Technology & Management, Aligarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very amazing. There is also lot of hygiene in our college. Also, lot of facilities like library, auditorium, seminar hall, wi-fi, computer labs, and so on are provided in our college. The hostel is not available in our college. Also, there is no mess too. There is a canteen in our college but the food was not very good in taste. And the sports and games facilities are good in our college but there is almost no time to play due to a lot of studies.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at ITM, Aligarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very stunning. There are a lot of facilities available in our college for the students to make them bright students. All the students are given the facilities of a library, wi-fi, computer labs, seminar hall, etc. At present, there is no mess and hostel in our college but the food offered by the canteen is good.

And the facilities available includes Wi-Fi, Labs, Library, sports facilities, etc. There is no hostel available in our college at the present time. So, there is also no mess food. But the canteen of our college is good and the food offered is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing College ITM, Aligarh.

But there is a canteen in which the food is of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: All about Institute of Technology & Management, Aligarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is well and good. And had good facilities of Wi-fi, library and sports etc. But there is no hostel in our college. Also, there is no mess in our college. But there is a canteen in our college which is average, because the quality of food is not very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with very good teachers and low placements.

Library is good with limited books and doesn't have books written by foreign authors. Games and sports facilities are good in our college. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Infra is good and teachings are also good.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, proper library, workshops and practical labs. The college has good teachers. The hostel is closed because there were not good number of students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best institute in Aligarh .

college_info.intro: Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Technology (SRIT) is well-known for its popular programme, namely BTech. BTech is offered across a variety of specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Information Technology. SRIT BTech is provided for a duration of 4 years. All the courses served by SRIT are affiliated with Anna University. Admission to all the SRIT courses is merit-based. Candidates can visit the official website to apply for the desired course.

reviews_list.review_title: Strict rules and a stressful environment for the students. Student strength is less.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students are placed in my course. 10 LPA to 25K packages are offered. Zoho, Virtusa, etc. are the top recruiters. Service-based roles are offered. Since it is a secondary college, students from my college go for placements at Sri Ramakrishna Engineering College. The released placement percentage is the overall average of both colleges.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My journey in EEE at SRIT.

content.Placements: About 50-70% of students from every department get placed, but this year, it was slightly down. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the average salary package offered is 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Soliton, CTS, Wipro, Zoho, and L&T visit the college to hire students. Internships are widely less in our college, rather we get direct placements.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi in our campus is currently developing, as of now, there are few Wi-Fi spots around the campus, but they are developing now in full wing. The library needs to get upgraded, but sufficient books are definitely available in our library. The hostel is average as my friends stay there as they include ending machines which are currently installed. It has 24x7 water and electricity facilities guaranteed with above-average food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure but not that much good placements.

content.Placements: 61 students are in my class. The highest package is 6 LPA, but I don't recommend you study here. Zoho, Soliton, Edu Versity, etc. are the top recruiters. There will be a lot of companies, but every company won't come directly to our college. We also have the Sri Ramakrishna Engineering College; you will be combined with those students.
content.Infrastructure: No wi-fi, classrooms are okay, not that good, libraries are okay, not worth the money, labs are not that good to work and there is no proper software to work. No wi-fi, no LAN connection to computer—everything is a waste of time and money.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Strict rules and a stressful environment for the students. Student strength is less.

content.Placements: 40% of students are placed in my course. 10 LPA to 25K packages are offered. Zoho, Virtusa, etc. are the top recruiters. Service-based roles are offered. Since it is a secondary college, students from my college go for placements at Sri Ramakrishna Engineering College. The released placement percentage is the overall average of both colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Poor signal, medical facilities are not easily accessible. Hostel food was below average until last year but I have no idea how it is today. The infrastructure is okay. Hostel buildings are old and they are in the middle of mountains, making them more susceptible to insects and animals .

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good hostel facilities and well-qualified faculties. The tie-up is with Malaysian University.

content.Placements: 1. 70 to 80% of students got placed. 2. The highest package is INR 7 LPA, and the lowest is INR 1.7 LPA. 3. ZOHO is the top recruiting company. Placement completely depends on your ability and performance; the colleges can only provide the path for the requirements; grabbing that opportunity and utilizing it is your part.
content.Infrastructure: 1. There is a good Wi-Fi connection in labs, hostels, and libraries. No Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. Classrooms are very spacious and comfortable. 2. Hostel facilities are much better than at other colleges in Coimbatore. Floors will be cleaned daily and sanitized properly.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides average placements, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: Students who score a 9.4 CGPA are eligible for placements. The highest salary package offered was 2 LPA. The lowest salary offered was Rs 40,000 per month. The average salary package offered was 1.50 LPA. Many students get government jobs in this course. Almost 100% of students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. The infrastructure is better. Our campus has free Wi-Fi facility. Laboratories are available. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library in this college. Thermal, electrical, hydraulic, and pneumatic laboratories are available. Canteen is better. Hostel facilities are decent. Sports are conducted in this college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My journey in EEE at SRIT.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in our campus is currently developing, as of now, there are few Wi-Fi spots around the campus, but they are developing now in full wing. The library needs to get upgraded, but sufficient books are definitely available in our library. The hostel is average as my friends stay there as they include ending machines which are currently installed. It has 24x7 water and electricity facilities guaranteed with above-average food.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but not that much good placements.
reviews.review_text: No wi-fi, classrooms are okay, not that good, libraries are okay, not worth the money, labs are not that good to work and there is no proper software to work. No wi-fi, no LAN connection to computer—everything is a waste of time and money.

reviews.review_heading: Strict rules and a stressful environment for the students. Student strength is less.
reviews.review_text: Poor signal, medical facilities are not easily accessible. Hostel food was below average until last year but I have no idea how it is today. The infrastructure is okay. Hostel buildings are old and they are in the middle of mountains, making them more susceptible to insects and animals .

reviews.review_heading: Good hostel facilities and well-qualified faculties. The tie-up is with Malaysian University.
reviews.review_text:
1. There is a good Wi-Fi connection in labs, hostels, and libraries. No Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. Classrooms are very spacious and comfortable.
2. Hostel facilities are much better than at other colleges in Coimbatore. Floors will be cleaned daily and sanitized properly.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides average placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. The infrastructure is better. Our campus has free Wi-Fi facility. Laboratories are available. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library in this college. Thermal, electrical, hydraulic, and pneumatic laboratories are available. Canteen is better. Hostel facilities are decent. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college has hostel facilities. Each hostel room has a bed, a fan, a study table, a chair, an almirah, etc. The meal is good. The hostel fees are affordable. It's close to college, so it saved me a lot of time. The college provides transportation.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements, and it has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Everything was fine. Wi-Fi should be improved. Classrooms were good. The library should be more spacious. They served very good food in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities were not good for hostel students. Medical facilities should be improved.

reviews.review_heading: It's a well reputed college in Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is considered to be average when compared to other colleges in Coimbatore, but the campuses are clean and well maintained whereas the hostels are a bit average and old. The college is located in a rural area away from the city which makes the place very peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRIT - Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is a little slow. The infrastructure is decent. There must be certain facilities that need to be provided in the hostel, like a television. There is no tower inside the hostel, which makes it difficult to take calls and use data services.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRIT - Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Laboratory and classrooms are average. Hostel facilities are also average. I would not recommend to join hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is neither good nor bad. Food is not good. The environment is good and the climate is better.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to study.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure to study well. All the lab equipment is available for practical implementation. Library in our college is good and has all the books relevant to academics.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and digital screens. There is a net lab, MBA lab, IT lab, CS lab, MAT lab, a lab, de lab, electrical machines lab, CAD lab, DSP lab, and more. Hostel rooms are spacious and each room is allotted for 3 students. Food served in the hostel is good. TV hall, gym, and recreation room are available in the hostel. Ambulance service is available and hospital services will be provided at Ramakrishna rural health care center.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good placements and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: In our department, we have good Wi-Fi and good lab facilities. The library is very useful, and it has lots of books. There are medical facilities to take intensive care of students. Our college got a great contract for the food service, so we are well known for it. As our college was provided with a great environment for the field of sports, we are acquiring the best sports here.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty members and very bad placements in my CSE branch.

content.Placements: Less than half including me are placed in my branch and in other branches, depending on number of students they get placed. They offer internships only for CSE branch students which is free for 6 months and after that there's nothing. No great companies, only Amravati companies that want free labour. Nothing should be offered in our college, only the internship provided by the college to handle websites, and do clerical work. No one from my college is placed. Very bad TPO who does not care about anyone in my department.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available but there is a major problem with internet connectivity. We have central computer labs. It has Windows 7 running on PCs. College is located outside of Amravati, and that is the biggest problem. No proper guidance about internships and government internships.

reviews.review_heading: I had a great journey to complete the graduation from this institute.
reviews.review_text: The golden period was the time when we lived in a college hostel, and we enjoyed very much living in it. The college has well-managed the rules and regulations of the hostel, which makes the studying atmosphere better for students. The canteen is full of food. There are plenty of instruments for the practicals and teachers give the proper instruments for proper study. All instruments are new and of the best quality.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the facilities and good placements offered in 2019.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided to students are very good here. Most of the instruments are available in the lab, and there are all types of books in the library. In college time, Wi-Fi is available. The college canteen is good, and the food served is fresh. Sports and games are also regularly conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good, so they need to be improved.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. Every branch has its own building consisting of at least 2 computer labs. Classrooms are well furnished and have a good view. The library is huge and also consists of a computer lab, and various book banks are also available in the library, along with the topper book bank facility. Accessibility to all national-level published papers is provided. Every equipment is provided in labs. There is no hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides really good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The institute has a well-stocked library with a selected collection of over 18230 volumes. There is a modernise computer lab. High-Quality career-oriented educational programs are delivered by qualified and experienced faculty. The college offers a peaceful atmosphere to study.

reviews.review_heading: The college has all the facilities required.
reviews.review_text: Facilities such as Wi-Fi and playground are available. Laboratories were properly maintained, and the equipment is in proper working condition. The experiments were carried out by the teachers thoroughly, and the practical records were also checked.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Dr. Rajendra Gode Institute Of Technology and Research.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is really good. I can proudly say that this college has the best infrastructure. The college also has Amaravati sports ground. A lawn and a huge library are also available here. Around 500 students can easily study in the library. Even the Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. The best aspect of our college is its infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good according to your academic percentage.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and the environment is good for study. The campus is lush green, and it is such type of campus which every student wants to be in. The canteen is also good as it offers delicious meals at a very less price. Medical facilities are available as there is an inbuilt hospital for us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College life of B.Tech students.

content.Placements: Currently, in my course, students who got placed are around 15-20 of the total 200 students. From the previous year of the 60 batch, 15 students got placed. The highest package offered ranges from 30-32 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 2-2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies of my course are TCA, Lenskart, and Infosys. Around 10-15 percent of students got placed in my course. Most of the students got placed in non-tech companies, and a few of them in tech. The top roles offered in my course are full-stack and software developers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Birla Institute of Applied Sciences is a decent college with serene views.

content.Placements: Mostly, either non-tech or tech companies with bond visits the college offering low salary packages. Only a limited number of students get any sort of internships. Our top recruiters include decent companies like Lenskart and mass recruiters like Akitra.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms of the first-year students are pretty, but as our seniority increases, so does the quality of our hostel and dormitory rooms. Final year and third year students stay in the same hostel. Quality of food served is pretty decent, but sometimes it is pretty uneatable.

reviews.review_heading: College life of B.Tech students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my course or department are quite good, but some of the things are in progress. The quality of facilities in my hostel is not maintained. There is a lack of rooms and buildings for hostels. The quality of food is good in the mess and canteen. All other facilities, like sports, games, and medical facilities, are good.

reviews.review_heading: Birla Institute of Applied Sciences is a decent college with serene views.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms of the first-year students are pretty, but as our seniority increases, so does the quality of our hostel and dormitory rooms. Final year and third year students stay in the same hostel. Quality of food served is pretty decent, but sometimes it is pretty uneatable.

reviews.review_heading: I am not that dissatisfied and this college is okay.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are bad. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. Labs are good. Fully furnished classrooms are also bad, no fan in the classroom. Library is also good, it contains all types of books you want to read on the subject or related to the topic. It contains 1 clinic where for 2 hours there is a doctor.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, everything is good.
reviews.review_text: There are good classrooms and a big library also. Labs for each subject are there, and proper experiments are done there. Wi-Fi is available and there is a good speed of Wi-Fi. Everything is good. A good canteen is there where food is fresh and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely okay college with good placements and good facility support.
reviews.review_text: All labs are available for doing any practicals. Wi-Fi, labs, a good library, smart classroom are provided by the college because they save time to do whatever you want. Our hostel life is very good because it teaches how to survive in society, how to talk with seniors, and how to give respect to everyone who is senior to you.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with budget-friendly fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and has good Wi-Fi connection and spacious classrooms for approximately 60 students in 1 classroom. Library is also good and has proper records of books and is also updated according to the syllabus. The sports that are played here are cricket, football, basketball badminton, table tennis, volleyball, and athletics has proper equipment and always ready ambulance for injury or in case of sickness and also a dispensary for first aid or immediate action. Ev...

reviews.review_heading: Low placements but good teaching.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 buildings inside the college and the ground is also small. Wi-Fi is available and libraries are good and labs are also there but the conditions of the labs are bad. The hostel environment is good but the food in mess is bad, while the food of canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Decent experience but lacks modern edge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Classrooms have basic amenities but lack modern equipment. Labs are decent but can be upgraded. Hostel facilities are okay, with manageable rooms and hygiene. But the hostel is not very spacious or well-maintained. Hostel rooms are small.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable and average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hostels is pretty basic. There are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library available. The food quality of the mess is average. The canteen is also available for students which provides very affordable food. Medical and sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It provided average placements in 2024. It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. The food served in the mess is above average. Hostel life is good.

reviews.review_heading: Summarizing Birla Institute of Applied Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and library are quite good, but you can see some lags in classrooms, they are just like schools. The hostel facilities are also appreciable, rooms are okay, and mess food is also better than some colleges. Students here are so focused on sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: My college life at Birla Institute of Applied Sciences, Bhimtal.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good but can be improved, as labs can have more equipment related to the particular subjects. Classrooms are spacious and well-equipped with the necessary equipment. The library has a vast variety of books related to subjects and a good quality of novels. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is amazing and very pocket-friendly for students.

reviews.review_heading: Sell the natural wind of trees.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi networks are too slow and don’t work properly. Classrooms haven’t been modified in the last 15 years. Hostel rooms are too small, and there are no separate washrooms for each room. Mess timings should be fixed for breakfast, and gym timings should also be fixed.

reviews.review_heading: Covered with hills and lakes.
reviews.review_text: Basically, in winters, there is a regular cutoff of electricity due to excess usage of heaters, blowers, and some other electric appliances. Sometimes, on the previous night of the exam, students face trouble studying due to a lack of electricity. Wi-Fi is also not good.
