A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) has been rated 2.4 on placements on the basis of 37 reviews done by students.
faqs.question: Does GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) provide good placement facilities?

faqs.answer: A:    GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) offers median package range of (aprx)INR 300,000 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program as well. Additionally, it has been rated 2.4 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.
faqs.question: How much placements salary students get after studying in GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET)?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) courses range between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class (SSLC/Matriculation) examination or equivalent qualification from any recognised board/council.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.Tech

review_content.Placements: Around 80 to 95% of the students got selected in the campus placement drive. They are offered with sufficient salary and good fieldwork. People got higher salaries. Our college gives training for placements, branch training, workshops, taught good communication skills, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college hostel is spacious and has a good atmosphere. The hostel has a large mess with good food. It is a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and 4 members per room are allotted with a steel cot for each. There are spacious sports areas, morning tea, coffee, breakfast, afternoon lunch, evening coffee with snacks and dinner. faqs.answer: Getting admission to GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) is moderately competitive. The college primarily admits students through the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counseling, which is based on the marks obtained in the 10+2 exams with subjects like Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. review_summary.college_name: GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET).

content.Placements: Almost 95% of students got placed in top companies. The highest salary offered was Rs 75,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs 25,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was excellent. CCTV camera was installed in this college. Hostel facilities were good. Playground was also available. The food served in the mess was better. Canteen facility was average in this college.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality was very good. They taught us both online and offline methods. They also conducted practical classes so all students could easily pass the exams. Our teachers were very friendly. There were many degree courses in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: My college is satisfying, and good placement, faculty is well knowledgeable

content.Placements: I went for at least 8 to 9 industrial visit and for 3 to 4 internships. Now many placement came our college and I attended 6 interview till now. Placement officer itself is our department staff. In some some company many students are placed. 70% student got internship.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well advanced. Many labs are available for each and every subject with good lab assistants. Sports are conducted and also on sports day so many willing students participate in sports as their wish. The library is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET).

content.Placements: Around 80 to 95% of the students got selected in the campus placement drive. They are offered with sufficient salary and good fieldwork. People got higher salaries. Our college gives training for placements, branch training, workshops, taught good communication skills, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel is spacious and has a good atmosphere. The hostel has a large mess with good food. It is a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and 4 members per room are allotted with a steel cot for each. There are spacious sports areas, morning tea, coffee, breakfast, afternoon lunch, evening coffee with snacks and dinner. Laboratories are spacious, and there is a large library with books, hard books, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities, and they should concentrate more on placements.

content.Placements: The placement is one of the disadvantages for marine engineering cadets. Students are mostly placed only in small companies, or else, we have to try jobs outside of this field. There are many companies conducting exams. Some are Synergy, Walem etc. Even if we want to get placed, we have to gain good knowledge to move forward.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides several facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, workshops, a separate library for marine students etc. The hostel facilities are there along with good food daily. There are gyms and swimming pools which are useful for students to relax.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and courses.

content.Placements: 1) 30% were placed in our course. 2) The highest package offered in our course is around 20000 - 30000 3) CSS corps, AccentureVirtusa were the top recruited companies 4)30% of students got internship in our course. 5) process specialist roles were offered.
content.Infrastructure: 1)Labs, classrooms, library will be good and there is no Wi-Fi facilities in our college. 2) The rooms in our hostel will be good. Mess food will be better. Canteen will be good. Medical facilities will be good. Inter college tournaments are conducted in our college.

faqs.question: How can I get into GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
GKM College of Engineering and Technology (GKMCET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class (SSLC/Matriculation) examination or equivalent qualification from any recognised board/council.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced

review_summary.college_name: PCT - Park College of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Environmental Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Waste of money and time studying there.

content.Placements: There is no placement at all, not only for our batch. They don't provide placements from the start of college in 2008 to till now 2022. Teachers will send some students to some companies with their contracts but it's not more than 1.5 LPA CTC. No internship will provide by the college, students need to arrange it.
content.Infrastructure: We don't see any standard classroom, laboratory, or restroom. There is no lab equipment, and we used older ones, that may be bought in the 90s and also not working at all. They called some godowns an auditorium. For physical education, there is no staff in that college. Because of that, students miss some zonal and tournaments. There are no gaming facilities like balls, nets, cones, bats, Matt. They don't clean the grounds we students collectively put money and clean grounds. The hostel is quite good, room space and facilities are well enough but toilet facilities are not nice. They won't clean it often, no Wi-Fi, no heater. The mess is okay with cleaning but the food is worse no menu is maintained, and at night times they mostly prepare tomato rice.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Environmental Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: This college is not a place to expect the best.

content.Placements: Placements are provided in anonymous companies for students of the core branch, and if it is a reputed company, you will not get placed in your domain. The pay is not satisfactory in both the cases. Now the placements are provided due to the efforts made by the principal Dr Krishnakumar Nadarajah and the HODs.
content.Infrastructure: The girls' hostel is not inside the campus, and they will provide a bus for you to reach the hostel. There will be a half-constructed building in the front which they claim they will finish in 2 or 3 months, and they told me the same thing in 2014. The labs have instruments.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are very good. We can easily get a job the placements. It is a centre for excellence in imparting creative thinking, fostering innovation and overall international exposure to create the best pool of talents with character, skills and attitude to compete in the global arena.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is spread over an area of 20-acres. We have well-equipped labs and air-conditioned seminar hall. We have 24-hour internet facilities with 48 Mbps, Wi-Fi, a digital library for international conference and journals and emphasis on co-curricular and sports activities in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The worst management needs your money, not recommend for any kind of students.

content.Placements: My college provides good placements. They take Rs. 6000 from each student in two semesters for placement training. In that, they give training like aptitude. For placements, they bring call centres and some local lathe machine workshops. Even they don't want the students with arrears.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not better. Even some of the blocks I studied was built after when I joined there. You should walk 2 km from the road to college if you do not pay the fee for college bus. For bus facility, they collect huge amount for the very near stop which costs only 10 rupees for both up and down through other buses.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: If you select this college for studies, then you wasted your life.

content.Placements: The students need above 65 percentage marks to choose this college. They offer one or two placements for their students with the average salary of Rs. 15,000 per month. There is nothing to say about this college as the poor placements are offered in this college. The placement cell compiles with their group of institutions, which is not good for this college students, The internship is not available. The government scholarships are only available for the students.
content.Infrastructure: The proper canteen is not available, and the food is not much good in the canteen. The Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel only with two major connections. A purer lab is available in the hostel facility is much better, and they are still improving. The classrooms are normal, and there are no digital classrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good Infrastructure, Faculty, Placements in 2023. 2026 Looks Promising.

review_content.Placements: 10 LPA was offered by a private company for our seniors of the 2019 batch. Approximately 10 students were selected for that job from our college. This is the scenario of the 2019 batch, meaning the 2023 pass-out students. But let me be frank, in 2024, there were very few placements. Yes, some students were placed in sales companies and are working there, i.e., Mumbai, Delhi, Chennai, etc. But this is not an effective and high-package job, which would be best for the livelihood of the person.
review_content.Infrastructure: Let me say that the best feature of our college is the well-organized infrastructure, which is why students don't face any trouble at all. In Bihar, the courses are very late. Sometimes it takes approximately 11 months to complete one semester, while on the other hand, it provides only 3 months to complete the next semester. This is really the worst thing about Bihar engineering. The completion of the course is not fixed. I think that the 4-year course is being completed in 4.5 years. Because of this, many students face trouble, as they are not able to get enrolled in the next course they want to pursue, like M.Tech or MBA. So, be ready to face these problems before enrolling and getting admission in Bihar engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides quality education at affordable fee.

review_content.Placements: Our branch doesn't have any placement records. The training and placement cell is very active and makes efforts to provide placements. Our batch has participated in two placement interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Academic and administrative building is very good. There are modern laboratories for all the branches. Our college has a six-storyed boys' hostel which can accommodate all the 4th year students and a 4-storyed girls' hostel to accommodate all the girls. There are separate messes for boys and girls in their respective hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best affordable government Engineering College.

content.Placements: As my course started in 2023, no one got passed yet. But rather than Computer Science and Engineering, students from other branches get placed. Average salary package was about 4-6 LPA. College training and placement cell manages to get internships for students. Approximately 85% students get an internship.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Lack of student faculty relationship.

content.Placements: Placements of our college are average and depend on the branch that the student has chosen. Students from the CSE branch have the highest number of placements. content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are fabulous. Labs have a proper and good amount of tools and equipment, and practical classes with regular attendance are conducted. Wi-Fi facility in the hostel is a bit annoying. The library has good facilities. But, medical facilities are absent. There is no availability of an ambulance or any vehicle for medical emergencies. The canteen situation is the worst. Sports and games are organized regularly.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides quality education at affordable fee.

content.Placements: Our branch doesn't have any placement records. The training and placement cell is very active and makes efforts to provide placements. Our batch has participated in two placement interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Academic and administrative building is very good. There are modern laboratories for all the branches. Our college has a six-storyed boys' hostel which can accommodate all the 4th year students and a 4-storyed girls' hostel to accommodate all the girls. There are separate messes for boys and girls in their respective hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Government Engineering College West Champaran Review.

content.Placements: This college is new, that's why placements are negligible. TCS and HCL technology came to recruit students. Some students have been placed in HCL and TCS. The college has shifted to a new campus so companies come to recruit students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a new campus. The academic buildings and hostel are available in the college. Wi-Fi facilities are good. Hostel mess is above average in terms of quality. Medical facilities are not good.
content.Faculty: Some teacher and professor are new. That's why academics and projects do not help students. For project work, professors can be helpful. The syllabus of B.Tech is competitive. It is industry oriented, so semester exams are of good level.

reviews.review_heading: Best affordable government Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are comfortable, and the lab is well-maintained. Full campus is covered with high-speed Wi-Fi. There are hostel and mess facilities. There are water heaters in the washroom to help in winter. Every year, there is an inter-sport competition with other colleges

reviews.review_heading: Lack of student faculty relationship.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are fabulous. Labs have a proper and good amount of tools and equipment, and practical classes with regular attendance are conducted. Wi-Fi facility in the hostel is a bit annoying. The library has good facilities. But, medical facilities are absent. There is no availability of an ambulance or any vehicle for medical emergencies. The canteen situation is the worst. Sports and games are organized regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure, Faculty, Placements in 2023. 2026 Looks Promising.
reviews.review_text: Let me say that the best feature of our college is the well-organized infrastructure, which is why students don't face any trouble at all. In Bihar, the courses are very late. Sometimes it takes approximately 11 months to complete one semester, while on the other hand, it provides only 3 months to complete the next semester. This is really the worst thing about Bihar engineering. The completion of the course is not fixed. I think that the 4-year course is being completed in 4.5 years. Because of...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides quality education at affordable fee.
reviews.review_text: Academic and administrative building is very good. There are modern laboratories for all the branches. Our college has a six-storyed boys' hostel which can accommodate all the 4th year students and a 4-storyed girls' hostel to accommodate all the girls. There are separate messes for boys and girls in their respective hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Government Engineering College West Champaran Review.
reviews.review_text: The college has a new campus. The academic buildings and hostel are available in the college. Wi-Fi facilities are good. Hostel mess is above average in terms of quality. Medical facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: The college administration and the ability of its resources.
reviews.review_text: College administration and hostel building is so good. Wi-Fi in the hostel is good. The administrative building is nice. Mess is available but the quality of food is very poor. There are sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure of my hostel is goodand teachers are not so helpful
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my hostel is good but there is no Wi-Fi for students, not only in hostel but in administration buildings. Classrooms are good, and library is in two parts, one is reading section and other is central book. The quality of food in mess is not so good, there is lack of medical facilities till now, other is a club for sports and game which held the whole schedule of game.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Engineering College, West Champaran.
reviews.review_text: It is a new college so the hostel is new and its facilities are good. The mess is good. Classrooms, labs, and library facilities are good. Wi-Fi isn't provided for students. Academic sessions are good. Students are interested in projects and research-based education.

reviews.review_heading: The College is good, but not the university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good and well maintained. The campus is average. Hostel is good and fees is taken per semester as approximately between 30k - 40k. The college location is awesome. It is in front of the Railway Station (Kumarbagh Railway Station).

reviews.review_heading: Our college is new, so all faculty members and college management are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and building of our college are proper. It has hostel facilities for boys and girls. There is also an auditorium, and our college playground is huge. There are also sports facilities, and for exercise also, there are faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: About Government College with excellence.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean with projectors, labs have proper equipment, and Wi-Fi is available. The library has enough books and a quiet study space. Hostel rooms are decent. Mess food is average, and canteen is better. Medical help is available, and there are good sports facilities too.

reviews.review_heading: Placement opportunities are limited, especially for core branches.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in the college are good. There are labs, smart classes, Wi-Fi, and a library for the students. Overall facilities and infrastructure provided by the college are good. The quality of food is average one can say provided in the mess. The medical facilities, sports, and games provided by the college are good.

college_info.intro:
Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University's flagship programmes are BSc, BTech, and MBA. The institute offers a three-year BSc programme across various specialisations such as Forensic Science, Cardiovascular Technology, Medical Microbiology, and Fashion Design.
APG Shimla University is one of the eminent universities. The university offers an MBA specialisation in HR, Marketing, IB, Finance, and others. The BTech programme offered by Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University is a four-year CSE, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. The below-mentioned are Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University's popular programmes:

placements.overview: Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University placements 2025 has not been released yet. The university has 100% job placement and job assistance offered to the students. The university offers internship opportunities to the students with a monthly stipend of INR 10,000. During, APG Shimla University placements, the highest package is INR 25.7 and starting salary is INR 3.6 LPA- 4.6 LPA. The top recruiters are Google, SBI, ITC Hotels, Kotak, Amazon, Tata Steel, Fortune, HDFC Bank, and others.

faqs.answer: A:    Some of the top recruiters of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University include Amazon, Tommy Hilfiger, Google, IBM, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, Amazon among many others. Placement records and package differs between various courses. You can check the official website of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University regarding the same .
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University?

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University for MBA is approximately INR 6 Lakhs per annum, the same for B.Tech is INR 5 Lakhs per annum. The packages offered are average, like most private universities here. To know more regarding the admission process, fee structure and other courses offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University, refer to the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: Can I join Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University accepts CAT, MAT, ATMA, XAT, HPCET, HPU MAT for admission in MBA. Students can appear and quality any of these Entrance Examinations to ensure their admission in Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University.To know more about admission in Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University, Students can go through the official website of the university.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must complete their graduation or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate to apply for Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University MBA programme. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregatre for candidates belonging to the reserved category. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it provides good academic years.

review_content.Placements: There are no direct placements in this field. We have to give government exams and interviews to secure a job. We can apply as a junior scientific officer at FSL and assistant professors at numerous universities after giving the NET exam. FSL provides internships to masters students for free or we have to pay them to train us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good both in the university and hostels. Wi-Fi is available but it does not work. Food is okay. The forensic laboratory in the college needs more instruments. Only two canteen stores are here on the campus. The library has many books and it needs more forensic books.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts & Bachelor of Legislative Law (B.A. LL.B.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Its good, it had excellent environment for studying.

review_content.Placements: Placement had been highly varying for each course, but as per the international student, a lot of them had been able to be placed in a lot of companies in their respective countries, and that alone had been a story of success. Local students had also seen a sharp increase in placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure needs improvement. I find the library to be stunning and most of the classrooms as well, but my suggestion would be to modernize the classrooms to properly function as a state of the art institution. The environment of the school was really something that stands out. You can not compare it to anything. I believe its very quiet and very refreshing.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts & Bachelor of Legislative Law (B.A. LL.B.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely supportive, the faculty pays more attention to students.

content.Placements: Being enrolled at APG, I had the opportunity to intern with the district court, high court, and private law firms. I could say our entire class got internships at the end of every semester, as it was a course requirement to do so. I'm glad I did all those internships because they prepared me.
content.Infrastructure: I can't really say a lot about hostels as I was staying in a rented apartment, but my friends who stayed in the hostel compliment the living situation of the hostels. The hostels take appropriate procedures regarding who enters and who doesn't inside the hostel, and for what purpose.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts & Bachelor of Legislative Law (B.A. LL.B.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, beautiful campus, good placement.

content.Placements: Alakh Prakash Goal Shimla University has a dedicated placement cell that actively works towards providing career opportunities for students. Each year, reputed companies from various sectors visit the campus to select qualified candidates for different roles.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of university is modern and student-friendly, with Wi-Fi enabled throughout the campus and hostel too. The campus is green and scenic, enhancing the atmosphere for studying and relationships. Hostel provides comfortable accommodation with well-maintained rooms.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it provides good academic years.

content.Placements: There are no direct placements in this field. We have to give government exams and interviews to secure a job. We can apply as a junior scientific officer at FSL and assistant professors at numerous universities after giving the NET exam. FSL provides internships to masters students for free or we have to pay them to train us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good both in the university and hostels. Wi-Fi is available but it does not work. Food is okay. The forensic laboratory in the college needs more instruments. Only two canteen stores are here on the campus. The library has many books and it needs more forensic books.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts & Bachelor of Legislative Law (B.A. LL.B.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Its good, it had excellent environment for studying.

content.Placements: Placement had been highly varying for each course, but as per the international student, a lot of them had been able to be placed in a lot of companies in their respective countries, and that alone had been a story of success. Local students had also seen a sharp increase in placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure needs improvement. I find the library to be stunning and most of the classrooms as well, but my suggestion would be to modernize the classrooms to properly function as a state of the art institution. The environment of the school was really something that stands out. You can not compare it to anything. I believe its very quiet and very refreshing.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who are placed in our course was 89%. The lowest was 76%, the highest 98% and the average was 66%. Misho, Canara Bank, Amazon, and Airtel companies recruit. 100% Management roles are offered. A lot of companies recruit students who give positive recommendations.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities, such as library and Wi-Fi, are excellent, and classrooms are of a very high standard. The quality of the hostel is that of premium, and food is of average quality for international students. The mescal and sports with games are all available.

admission_overview.college_name: APG Shimla University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: APG Shimla University admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university considers the qualifying exam scores for admission to most of the courses.APGSUoffers UGC-recognised courses at UG and PG levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Arts, Journalism and Mass Communication, Hotel Management, etc. Candidates can apply online on the official website of the university forAPG Shimla University admissions.
The university offers more than 20 courses in full-time mode. Candidates can fill out the application form available on the university website. Below are the keyAPGSU admissionhighlights:
Particulars
APG Shimla University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG & PG
How to apply?
https://apply.agu.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

ForAP Goyal Shimla University admissionsto various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria forAP Goyal Shimla University admission:
Check out otherAPG Shimla University Courses

APG Shimla University admission processbegins with registration, followed by selection and admission confirmation. Candidates are first required to apply for the course of their choice. Below are the steps to get a seat in APG Shimla University:
STEP 1: APG Shimla University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates are first required to register with their personal email-id and mobile number. Aspirants also need to pay a non-refundable application fee to register for a course at APGSU.
STEP 2: Selection
Once the registration is over, candidates are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university may also accept entrance exams for admission to specific programmes.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment
The university confirms the admission to the candidates via email or message. Selected candidates need to pay theAPG Shimla University feeto confirm their seat.

courses_data.name: APG Shimla University BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science Engineeringat the UG level. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate can apply for the APG Shimla University BTech programme. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for the candidates belonging to the reserved category. Admission to BTech course is merit-based. However, the university may accept an entrance test for admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at APG Shimla University?
faqs.answer: Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offers four-year BTech course spread across eight semesters. Candidates after completing Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as subjects can apply for BTech course. The university offersBTech in Computer Science Engineeringat the UG level.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to BTech at Alakh Prakash Goyal University?
faqs.answer: Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offers admission to BTech course based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university may accept an entrance exam score for BTech admission. Besides, aspirants should also complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate to apply for APG Shimla University BTech course. Once selected, candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their admission in the university.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at APG Shimla University?
faqs.answer: The total annual fee for APG Shimla University BTech isINR 6.23 lakhfor four-years Candidates need to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Aspirants are required to pay tuition fee as per the frequency set by the university. Besides, candidates also need to pay registration fee in the start to apply for admission.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to B.Tech at APG Shimla University without JEE Mains score?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to a B.Tech programme at APG Shimla University without JEE Mains score. The interested candidate should have scored at least 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects in10+2 examination. It is one of the reputed colleges in the region known for providing quality education to its students.

placement_report.college_name: APG Shimla University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: AP Goyal Shimla University Placements 2023
paragraphs: The university has not released the 2023 placement statistics yet. However, the NIRF report 2023 is released. As per the report, 29 UG and 14 PG students were placed during AP Goyal Shimla University placements 2022. The median package for UG (3-year) and UG (4-year) courses was INR 2.5 LPA . For PG courses, the median package offered during AP Goyal Shimla University placements 2022 stood at INR 2.8 LPA .

faqs.question: Does Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offer better placements than Maharaja Agrasen University?
faqs.answer: Both the Universities are good in terms of infrastructure and faculties. However, Maharaja Agrasen University is definitely better in terms of placement records and packages. The university has a record of giving placements to more than 80 percent of students since 5 years. The package has also been decent i.e. 2.8 Lacs Per Annum - 8 Lacs Per Annum for most courses. Hence, Maharaja Agrasen University offers better placement that Andhra Pradesh Goyal Shimla University.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University?
faqs.answer: Some of the top recruiters of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University include Amazon, Tommy Hilfiger, Google, IBM, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, Amazon among many others. Placement records and package differs between various courses. You can check the official website of Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University regarding the same .

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University for MBA is approximately INR 6 Lakhs per annum, the same for B.Tech is INR 5 Lakhs per annum. The packages offered are average, like most private universities here. To know more regarding the admission process, fee structure and other courses offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University, refer to the official website of the institute.

hostel_campus.college_name: APG Shimla University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: AP Goyal Shimla University has magnificently designed separate hostels for boys and girls each with all modern facilities with boarding and other recreational activities. The hostels have their own mess to provide good and hygienic food to the students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Volleyball courts, Mountain and Nature Trekking Facilities, Billiards

hostel.description: AP Goyal Shimla University has magnificently designed separate hostels for boys and girls each with all modern facilities with boarding and other recreational activities. The hostels have their own mess to provide good and hygienic food to the students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Volleyball courts, Mountain and Nature Trekking Facilities, Billiards

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Physics Lab, Strength of Materials Lab, Kinematics Machines Lab, Dynamics of Machines Lab, Heat Transfer Lab, IC Engines Lab, Circuit Theory Lab, Microprocessor Lab, Control System Lab, VLSI Lab, Concrete Testing Lab, Surveying Lab, Soil Mechanics Lab, Sewing Lab, Computer Aided Design (CAD) Lab, Cutting Lab, Pattern Making Lab, Training Restaurant & Bar, Housekeeping Lab, Front Office Lab, IT Lab, Pharmacy Lab

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely supportive, the faculty pays more attention to students.
reviews.review_text: I can't really say a lot about hostels as I was staying in a rented apartment, but my friends who stayed in the hostel compliment the living situation of the hostels. The hostels take appropriate procedures regarding who enters and who doesn't inside the hostel, and for what purpose.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, beautiful campus, good placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of university is modern and student-friendly, with Wi-Fi enabled throughout the campus and hostel too. The campus is green and scenic, enhancing the atmosphere for studying and relationships. Hostel provides comfortable accommodation with well-maintained rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it provides good academic years.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good both in the university and hostels. Wi-Fi is available but it does not work. Food is okay. The forensic laboratory in the college needs more instruments. Only two canteen stores are here on the campus. The library has many books and it needs more forensic books.

reviews.review_heading: Its good, it had excellent environment for studying.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure needs improvement. I find the library to be stunning and most of the classrooms as well, but my suggestion would be to modernize the classrooms to properly function as a state of the art institution. The environment of the school was really something that stands out. You can not compare it to anything. I believe its very quiet and very refreshing.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities, such as library and Wi-Fi, are excellent, and classrooms are of a very high standard. The quality of the hostel is that of premium, and food is of average quality for international students. The mescal and sports with games are all available.

reviews.review_heading: The university area is nice but have to improve something.
reviews.review_text: There are no Wi-Fi facilities in our hostel as well as in the college. Classrooms and labs are quite good. Library is also good. The hostel rooms are good but hostel food is not good and hygienic. There are no medical facilities and no pharmacy for students.

reviews.review_heading: APG Shimla University: Hilltop campus, lush greenery, modern buildings, hostels, and sports.
reviews.review_text: Although the campus is not that big it is safe and secure. The ambiance of the university is very quiet and peaceful. Furthermore, the hostel is also safe. You'll get a family here. Rooms are good, big and furnished. Food available in a mess sometimes upsets your stomach but that's able to eat (truth). The infrastructure of the university and hostel is beautiful, especially library. Classrooms are facilitated with projectors, good lighting, and good desks. You can connect yourself with mother na...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, decent placements, and a great campus life at Shimla University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi. The library is well-stocked and useful for business studies, while the computer labs are functional. Hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms and 24/7 water and electricity. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are provided on campus, along with sports and gym facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Great University for introverts and if you love nature.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is just average. The labs still have old PCs, and while the Wi-Fi works in the labs, it is limited outside of them. The library is quite good and has plenty of books. Classrooms are fine, and the hostels are decent, equipped with almost all the necessary facilities. The canteen is spacious, but the food quality is inconsistent. There is a gym and sports equipment available for everyone to use.

reviews.review_heading: The overall review of this college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of the department are quite good compared to other departments, with facilities of free Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. The most attractive thing is the classroom. Through the classroom, you can see the beautiful natural scenery of Shimla, which looks very beautiful. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good, with free Wi-Fi and hot water in winter. The quality of the food available in the mess and canteen is good, and the fee for the mess is around 4,500 ...

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and weather are good, but faculty and management need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good, and the weather is one of the best here. The hostel is neat and clean, and the quality of food is good. They provide non-veg four times a week. There are three types of rooms: basic, premium, and super premium, with varying prices.

reviews.review_heading: Discipline is very important in this college.
reviews.review_text:
Our university has a hostel which is a shared room. Around our campus, there are many Pgs also. The pgs cost around 6000 rupees per month. It includes the necessary eating things and pockets money. The room of the hostel is quite big for two students to stay. Hostel Fee: INR 100000 per year
External Expenses: Rs.4000 - Rs.7000.

reviews.review_heading: The college is scenic, serene and remote. Culture and exposure are good, but placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is great. Classrooms, libraries and buildings are good. Facilities are great. A nurse is available here for medical responses. Canteen is great. There are many ethnicities in this college. You will get exposed to many types of people from many countries.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a peaceful environment to study.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure were provided for students. We had Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The library was quite good. The quality of the food served was also very good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, Sports and Games were also very good. Everything which was required by the student was available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: The worst university in the world.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility at the university is the worse than a 2G network while most of the systems in labs are useless. Classrooms are average, and only a few classrooms have projectors. There is no playground. The library is worse. As there is no playground, we can't think about the sports facilities for any kind of outdoor games. There is only a volleyball court available. One of the worst things is the food served in the college mess.

paragraphs: Fees for UG Courses like BE, B.Tech, B.Sc., LL.B., B.A.  and BBA ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs to 5 Lacs .
The fees is similar to other universities in India.
Students can go to the official website and enquire more about their desired courses and admission process at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University.

Fees for UG courses like B.Sc, M.Sc, B.A.LL.B, Diploma, B.E, B.Tech, BCA, B.Com and others start at INR 25,000 to 2 Lakhs Per Annum. Fees for Certificate courses range from INR 20,000 to 35,000 . The Fees range is similar to any other university in Shimla with an average fee of 1 Lakhs .
You can know more about all the 70 courses offered at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shima University on their official website.

Yes, Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University offers scholarhsip to the meritorious and deserving candidates. The university offers scholarhsip based on merit, need-based, and scholarship test. It is mandatory for students to qualify the eligibility criteria set by the university for the eligible scholarhsip. APG Shimla University offers various scholarship according to differnt criteria.

The total annual fee for M.Tech course at Alakh Prakash Goyal Shimla University is INR 2 lakh. The fee is INR 1 Lacs for each year. Candidates who are shortlisted have to pay an admission at the time of seat confirmation. Aspirants are advised to pay the fee within the specified time to avoid cancellation of admission.

description: Jaya Prakash Narayan College of Engineering JPNCE) cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Jaya Prakash Narayan College of Engineering JPNCE) TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 62878 and 112377 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech specialis

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 62878, 64762 and 80283, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Jaya Prakash Narayan College of Engineering JPNCE). Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Jaya Prakash Narayan College of Engineering JPNCE) MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 34307. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 25790, and the 2023 cutoff was 21314 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been decreasing in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: This college gives wonderful memories.
reviews.review_text: The college has nice and cool environment. The campus is peaceful and offers hostel facilities for girls free of charge. The college canteen serves good food. The hostel food is also good. There is a large playground, a parking area and free Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: This college is completely good for placements.
reviews.review_text: This college has a very attractive infrastructure and a good environment for students and lecturers. On this campus, we have hostel facilities. reviews.review_heading: Nice college and a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching quality is good. It provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. It is near a bus stop and auto stand. They provide facilities like maintained classrooms with comfortable benches for all students. It has good labs and a library stocked with Books. There is no hostel facility. The canteen is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good and the programs and teaching are too notch, placement is the only demerit.

review_content.Placements: Currently, placements at the college are quite poor; few reputable core companies come to recruit here. The placement rate is less than 10% in our branch, with the highest package at 6 lakhs, an average package of 3 lakhs, and the lowest package at 2 lakhs. Mostly IT companies, like Cognizant, are recruiting for our placements, and we are doing paid internships at Keltron. The main roles offered are not high-level positions, but rather entry-level engineer roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure facilities, including well-equipped classrooms and labs. Wi-Fi is available for students for academic purposes only. The library has a sufficient collection of books. Currently, there is no college hostel, as it is under construction. The private hostels offer varying levels of amenities. The canteen provides good quality food, and basic medical facilities are available. Sports and games are quite active.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good college because of the placement and environment.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of CS students got placement this year. But the placement rate of other departments is comparatively very low. Placement packages of 3.6 LPA to 12 LPA are being offered now. But most of the offers are coming with 4 - 4.6 LPA. SOTI and Coding Ninjas are the top recruiters. Most of the companies hire for developed and testing software vacancies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department provides a proper Wi-Fi connection for students. Labs are also upgraded, and systems are of moderate speed and fine. Classrooms are also technically well and keep good standards. There are no college-owned hostels, but there are many college-approved hostels available near the college. First aid boxes are provided on every floor. The sports grounds are great.

individual_reviews.title: College gives importance to studies, arts, and sports.

The overall infrastructure is well-built and maintained.

The overall infrastructure is well-built and maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is excellent. It is highly recommended.
reviews.review_text: Our college is developed. It contains several latest technologies. The canteen serves us with good food and services. Currently, the college does not provide a Wi-Fi facility. Labs are beneficial for us. This college also has NBA accreditation.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and the programs and teaching are too notch, placement is the only demerit.
reviews.review_text: We have good infrastructure facilities, including well-equipped classrooms and labs. Wi-Fi is available for students for academic purposes only. The library has a sufficient collection of books. Currently, there is no college hostel, as it is under construction. The private hostels offer varying levels of amenities. The canteen provides good quality food, and basic medical facilities are available. Sports and games are quite active.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college because of the placement and environment.
reviews.review_text: The department provides a proper Wi-Fi connection for students. Labs are also upgraded, and systems are of moderate speed and fine. Classrooms are also technically well and keep good standards. There are no college-owned hostels, but there are many college-approved hostels available near the college. First aid boxes are provided on every floor. The sports grounds are great.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college with excellent facilities, faculties, and proper quality of education.
reviews.review_text: Each department has free wifi and smart classrooms. One thing I dislike is that there are no college hostel facilities. The lab and other infrastructure are very good and spacious. The college canteen is nice and offers good food. Each lab is well-maintained with AC and has a good atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about Perumon College.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available and the college has good lab facilities. All the textbooks and reference books are available in the library. There is currently no college hostel available. But there are rooms and houses available near the college area. The food is okay. A lot of sports and game activities are present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering, Perumon.
reviews.review_text:
There is almost good infrastructure.
A nice football field, volleyball court, and basketball court are also there.
There is a nice campus and a nature-friendly campus with a lot of environmental elements.
There is also a lake near to the college.
Nice sports and camps are done.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of good placements, infrastructure, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Wi-Fi facility is available at high speed in our college. Labs are top-notch. The food served in the canteen is good and tasty. Our college provides medical facilities. Hostels are good. Toilets are very clean and tidy. Our college supports students in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: CEP is the second-best college in Kollam. As CEPian, it's a good experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is below average. It is not that good. Buildings are average. This college has 25 acres of land. But college has no hostel. Only homestays are available here. Homestays have boring food and there are so many other problems in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering Perumon.
reviews.review_text: The department block is quite old and in poor condition, but it is still better than other blocks. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, but you need the permission of the authorities to get the password. There is no official college hostel, but there are many private hostels nearby for boys and girls that provide good and hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus life and culturals.
reviews.review_text: Mechanical block is the newest block compared to other branches and large too but have little maintenance. The toilet facility is quite bad and really disgusting. There is no official college hostel but have many private hostels nearby for both girls and boys. The quality of food in the canteen is good and cheap too.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best engineering colleges in Kollam district, Kerala.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college is good, but not the best. Lab facilities are good. Hostel are provided outside the campus but very closer to the college. Food provided in canteen is good and economical. There are a lot of cultural, technical and sports event in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering Perumon.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel facilities are quite odd and still the same as when the college started. Wi-Fi is available on campus but only for faculty and administrative officers, and not for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good ambience and very friendly and supportive teachers.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. It has good labs. The library is quite good, and the food provided in the canteen is good enough and affordable too. Sports and games are conducted here. Teachers are very supportive in conducting sports and games. Medical services are good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Turning to be a disaster college!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite below average and quite a bit old. There is a lab and other equipments, but most of them are unstable and old. Wi-Fi is available, but only to administrative staff and teaching staff and not for students. The classrooms are not maintained and is still the same as when the college started, especially the toilet facility in the mechanical branch is a complete disaster.  They do not maintain it even though we complain about it.

faqs.answer: Jyothishmathi Institute of Technology and Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech./AMIE in CSE/ECE/ CSIT/IT/ETM/EEE/EIE & CSSE equivalent / Electronics. from a UGC recognised University/ Institute. Candidate belonging to reserve category can have 45% marks. Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2003). No maximum age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. faqs.question: Can I get admission to Jyothishmathi Institute of Technology and Science B.E. / B.Tech course without TS EAMCET?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is possible to get admission to Jyothishmathi Institute of Technology and Science B.E./B.Tech course without TS EAMCET. The institute also allows 30% management quota that means student admissions are done based on proficiency percentage of the examination 10+2 or equivalent. To qualify, candidates must have attained a mark of 45 % in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics. However, JEE Main scores are also considered for admission at the institute as well. The management quota seats are filled as per the merit of the candidate and fees of around INR 90,000 per annum is charged to the students while students appeared in the TS EAMCET have to pay INR 35,000 per annum.

description: Jyothishmathi Institute of Technology and Science cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Jyothishmathi Institute of Technology and Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 41207 and 88662 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech speci

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 41207, 75107 and 80661, respectively. reviews.review_heading: Jyothishmathi Institute of Technology and Science is one of the top colleges in Karimnagar.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure and Wi-Fi-enabled laboratories. The systems were very good, and the laboratories were very special and modernized. Classrooms were good. Library was very good, and the hostel was good but okay. The sports and games were very good compared to all.

reviews.review_heading: A few things that are nice to say but hard to digest.
reviews.review_text: It is a good course and I am glad to choose this course, and it has 2 divisions, like Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) and Artificial Intelligence Ai&ML Machine Learning experienced faculty members, good teaching, interactive, and wellness in the subject.

reviews.review_heading: An average college, and I'm not satisfied with the previous placements and the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I am currently attending an average college, and I am not satisfied with the previous placements. The infrastructure is low and the facilities are average. Sports opportunities are limited, and there are no medical facilities. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is average. There is no proper lab faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Jyothishmathi Institute of Technology and Science is an autonomous college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure in the course and the department are very good. It has well-accepted Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are hygienic. The best resources are available in the library. It has special editions and every new topic book is available there.

reviews.review_heading: The college was very good And the faculty is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was very good and Wi-Fi labs and classroom libraries and provide different subjects and libraries, books and et cetera, and the hostel was very clean and neat, and the food provided is very good and tasty and with the neat and well a cube classrooms, canteen and medical facility. We have a yoga room and medical and medicine. Doctors were provided and the sports and games were conducted in our college with the prize is also given to the winners and runners, et c...

reviews.review_heading: Do not join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Jyothishmathi Institute of Technology and Science is not very good. It is just an average college. There are not enough facilities available, and the college takes a lot of money from students but does not use it for development.

reviews.review_heading: I do not recommend the college to students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not at all good because of less investment in college. However, studies will be better but full of rules and it looks like a school. Wi-Fi or labs are not used by students because of poor conditions. It has cheap quality labs. There is a cheap and low-quality food in the hostel. It is better to be in private hostels. They charge an exam fee more than normal things.

reviews.review_heading: My personal suggestion is not to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The food is not tasty in my hostel. Only less quality is provided. It is not value for money. The hostel has a poor Wi-Fi signal for our laptops. There is no canteen. The library looks good. No one allows us in the class time. They allow us in only in a break time. They take a lot of money.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure and industry relevent curriculum.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure in our college for doing experiments and software technology. There are updated versions of infrastructure in our college. Digital classrooms are available in our college. A spacious library is present. Hostel facilities are available for boys and girls. A food mess and canteen are available for students in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are excellent. Our college provides good Wi-Fi connectivity. There are neat classrooms, labs, and a library hall in our college. The quality of the hostel facilities is good. The quality of the food available in the mess and canteen is good. Our college provides good medical facilities, sports, and games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to study with the best placements.
reviews.review_text: Our course has good infrastructure. Hostels are not good due to some issues with the old buildings. The infrastructure and the library are very good. The hostel food is not good. Wi-Fi is available. The lift is well-furnished. Our classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities and infrastructure , supported by teachers.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure  like Wi-Fi , labs , library, dg-classrooms ,sports , meditation  room , and so on are available in our college. 
The quality of the facilities in hostel food is fine. The mess and canteen were good. Medical facilities are available at any condition. Students get encouraged in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I do not recommend this college .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, modern classrooms, and plenty of books in the library. The hostel is not recommended for sure. Definitely, you will be disappointed. Overall, the infrastructure and facilities in this college are modern.

reviews.review_heading: This can be a good college and institute.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides high-quality infrastructure for the course. The facilities this college provides for its students are far better than most of the colleges I personally know. The labs are connected with a good network and provide Wi-Fi for the students. The hostel facilities are also good. The food provided is hygienic, and the college also offers free medical care for students and faculty, and even to others outside.

reviews.review_heading: My college Jyothishmathi Institute of technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: The campus is modern and well-maintained, with everything you need for both studying and living comfortably. The classrooms are equipped with the latest technology, the labs are up-to-date, and the hostels are quite comfortable with good facilities. In the library, we find all types of books.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The important subjects might vary slightly depending on the university as every university follow a certain set of guidelines when it comes to their coursework, but common topics covered in the course usually remain almost the same that include]Advanced Algorithms and Data Structures]Software Engineering Principles]AI and MLComputer Networks and Distributed SystemsDatabase Management SystemsComputer Architecture and OrganizationYou also get to choose from a variety of elective subjects in the second year as per your interests and career goals.Know more about -MTech Courses

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college facilities, and everything is perfect.

content.Placements: I have seen placements in this college. The top companies visit our college after 2-3 months. Recently AMBUJA Cement visited our college and a good number of students are placed by them. I joined this college in September and till now 3 - 4 companies visited here. I have also seen past placements records of our college, so I can conclude that this college provides good placements.
content.Infrastructure: The campus of this college is good as well as convenient. This college has many facilities such as Wi-Fi, laboratories with all equipment for all subjects. It also has library, and it is easy to find any book in the library. Books are arranged in a very good way. I am a day scholar, so I do not know about hostel food and rooms but from the outside, hostel buildings are well built and look good.
