reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college facilities, and everything is perfect.
reviews.review_text: The campus of this college is good as well as convenient. This college has many facilities such as Wi-Fi, laboratories with all equipment for all subjects. It also has library, and it is easy to find any book in the library. Books are arranged in a very good way. I am a day scholar, so I do not know about hostel food and rooms but from the outside, hostel buildings are well built and look good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. It provides Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, and a library. The facilities available in the hostel are good. Food quality is good, and everyday food changes. Sports facilities are good. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching level is average
reviews.review_text:
Campus have Wi-Fi, quality of food is good too. Also hostels are nice too no issues there the best thing in this college is its library have all kinds of books, classrooms are nice all of them have AC's. 
College do have medical facilities, also hospital is like 1km away from  
college don't have any sports activities
.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with average placements and average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. For every subject in our course, we have a lab, and Jio Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are in better condition. The hostel management is also good. The quality of food in the mess is average. Medical facilities are average. We have a gym to work out, and there are better facilities for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because there were no placements for our batch 2017.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi without password, classrooms are fine, but the library is very good, and there are a lot of books for reading, and the atmosphere of the library is good for studies. I am not a hosteler, so I don't know anything about hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Fake placements are provided, and the faculty are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The whole campus is air-conditioned. The library is wonderful. The canteen is good. The college is good in terms of infrastructure, but don't choose this on this basis. Quality of education provided is below par, and the faculty members are average. I suggest you choose a government college for better growth.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Sangrur D.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all the facilities for the students as well as for the teachers. Our college has free Wi-Fi for the students, so they can't feel that they are in the old type of college. It has a big playground for sports activities. We have good labs classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I think opting for engineering in this institute is a waste of money and time.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is average. The college is situated on Chandigarh Bathinda highway and nearer to Sangrur district. Location-wise, it is a good college.

reviews.review_heading: Its okay not a very good and not a very bad.
reviews.review_text: I satisfied with their library infrastructure and rest of all like a government building. They have one Library, one Engineering building, one Polytechnic building, one Nursing building, two hostels, one faculty residence, one basketball court, one playground where we can play football carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Its the best college with the name of Bhai Gurdas ji.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing, Wi-Fi have full network and classrooms are near and clean, lots of books in the library from the best authors, its in top 10 colleges of Punjab, Hostel rooms and hygienic food for the students, best quality food in the canteen and filtered water for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the management and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are of medium size. There are three labs, but equipment is not worthy. We have lack of faculty. The Wi-Fi facility is there on the campus, but it is not working properly. The canteen is simple. The food quality is good. The hostel rooms are fine, but sometimes, cooler might not work. You will have to pay fine without your fault if anything happens. I faced many issues during my tenure at the college like Wi-Fi problem, faculty issue, and project related issue.

reviews.review_heading: Honestly, I don't recommend this college. Don't spoil your college life like I spoiled it.
reviews.review_text:
Honestly, I don't like the college infrastructure. Ripped chairs, not proper ventilation makes it really hard to attend a lecture.
Never cleaned labs (as I expected)
or lack of books in the library are some negative aspects. If they have 50 to 60 students in the whole class, the students can still find no books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: As far as the infrastructure of the college is concerned, it is among the best in Punjab. The academic block is having large classrooms and labs are equipped with all the latest facilities. There are two separate hostels for boys and girls, and they are well-built.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are fake in BGIET, Sangrur.
reviews.review_text: The labs are of moderate level. There are a medical facility and the library. The classrooms are not much high tech. The teachers are below average. The infrastructure is good, but technically this college is below average. The skill and technical strength of the students of this college are almost zero. There are no efforts to improve the level of education except giving pressure on lectures. The lectures can help to get good marks in exams, but we come to the college to gain the practical and ...

reviews.review_heading: Superb quality with a better lifestyle.
reviews.review_text:
As we enter the institute, there is a beautiful lawn at the right side followed by a well-furnished building with a beautiful entrance.The computer labs are one of the most attractive parts with high-speed Ethernet. The library is another classic building.
Everyone can get any required book on their demand.
Proper sitting arrangements are there for those students who want to study in the library.
Students can update their current knowledge by reading newspapers.
There is pin drop silence in the ...

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best semi-government engineering colleges in NE India.

review_content.Placements: We have good placements in college. We heard many rumours from our seniors that the college doesn't provide good placements, but it's not like that in any way. The college provides placements in many companies, and mainly IT companies. The placements are most helpful for everyone, and they are provided according to your knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very good. It is neat and clean, and it is surrounded by lots of flowers. The library and the canteen are fabulous. There is a big playground, and the college is fully Wi-Fi enabled. All the labs are awesome. There's an auditorium, and there are also a library, e-library, canteen and admission cell in another building. The labs are currently based on the new inventions related to all the courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Don't ruin and spoil your glorifying career by taking admission in these type of colleges.

review_content.Placements: We were the senior most batch of our college. Various companies like Ofos Private limited, Concierge Technologies Private Limited, Rioth Corporate limited etc., came to our college for placement activities during our final year. These companies offered an average package to our students. At first, we all thought that our college could create history as all the students were placed. And, as being the first batch, it was a remarkable achievement for our college, but later we came to know that all these companies were actually a fraud company in more or less a similar manner and our college was also a part of it to ruin our careers. I myself got placement in Concierge Technologies Pvt limited. It offered me a very low package of Rs. 13000 per month. In the offer letter, it was written that I could join the company after 6-months from my passing date after completing my graduation, which took me by surprise. I only thought what may be the reason for such a delay. Eventually, when the joining date came, the company didn't even communicate with me anyway, and I then decided to go to Lucknow, the location of the company, to join the company. It took me by surprise when I came to know that the company didn't go our college to hire our students. I then called our placement cell sir and made him talk with the MD of the company. After a long conversation, the MD said that he was not even aware that some representatives of the company went our college for any placement activities. He further said those people were once employed in that company but later suspended due to involvement in various fraudulent activities. Hearing this I was left at nowhere but only to think why I took admission in this irresponsible and *lopsided (*only knows to earn money by ruining students career and nothing else)college. An internship was provided only to certain students, and during that period instead of giving any stipend, they just took Rs 5000 per student as internship fee. Rest students had to manage there internship themselves which sounds very bad. Placement Cell is present, but it is not effective at all anyhow. It is not even responsible enough to bring some genuine companies which can shape the career of the students. Instead, it brings only such fake companies in order to make the name of the college glorifying that they are giving 100% placements.

review_summary.college_name: Scholars Institute of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good campus experience.

content.Placements: We have placements from Jan, so till now, around 80% of students are selected from mock interviews. The highest salary package offered was 47 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 8 LPA. This can be extracted from the college website as companies vary each year. About 99% get internships in companies like MSME, IOCL, etc. Top roles are machine designing, graphic design, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are very interactive and cooperative. College has Wi-Fi in every corner, making it easily accessible. Labs are beautiful and fully equipped, and the library has very knowledgeable and quality books. Classrooms are technically advanced with projectors. Hostel has a 24/7 facility electricity and water with average mess food and a shop for daily amenities. Medical first aid is available for students. Sports and games are available, including both indoor and outdoor activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities. Faculty members are very helpful.

content.Placements: Placements are different for different branches in this college. Placements for the civil engineering branch are average. Placements for other branches are good, but yet less than 50% of the students get placements. So, placements depend on the knowledge of the students as well.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is one of the best when compared to other colleges in the region. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped, clean and have a good environment. Hostel rooms are spacious and are available on a single-sharing basis. Indoor sports facilities like table tennis, badminton, carrom board, etc., are also available. Gymnasiums are available in the hostel as well as in the college. A huge central library and Wi-Fi facility are also available.

admission_process.title: Scholars Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Scholars Institute of Technology and Management admission is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers admission to BTech, BSc, BBA and BCA. Admission to BTech course is based on scores of JEE Main/ CEE/ SITM Entrance exam. For remaining courses, theSITM Guwahatiadmits students based on their past academic scores. The application process for all courses is conducted in an online mode. Read on the following article to know more about SITM Guwahati admissions.
For SITM Guwahati course admissions, candidates must qualify for the minimum eligibility and selection criteria as follows:
JEE Main/Assam CEE/ SITM Entrance Exam

Scholars Institute of Technology and Management admission process includes filling the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds. Check below the detailed steps related to Scholars Institute of Technology and Management admission 2025:

headings.text: Scholars Institute of Technology and Management Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria
Scholars Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

lists: Apply online on the official website of Scholars Institute of Technology and Management. Fill the application form with all the relevant details and submit the form along with paying an application fee.

The selection will be done based on the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates for BBA, BSc and BCA courses. However, for BTech, candidates must qualify for either JEE Main. Assam CEE or SITM Entrance Exam.
The selected candidates will be informed by email. They must pay a certain amount of course fee to lock their seats.

courses_data.name: Scholars Institute of Technology and Management BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Scholars Institute of Technology and Management offers a full-time BTech that lasts for four years. To get into this programme, students need to have good scores in the JEE Main/ CEE or SITM Entrance exam. Below is more information about the eligibility requirements, selection criteria, and fees for Scholars Institute of Technology and Management BTech admission in 2025.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Scholars Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: Scholars Institute of Technology and Management BTech fees structure includes various components such as Tuition Fee, Application Fee, Caution Fee and more. The total fee for BTech ranges between INR 4.4 Lacs – INR 4.5 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BTech at Scholars Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: To get admission to a four-year BTech course at Scholars Institute of Technology and Management, candidates must pass Class 12 with minimum 45% aggregate from a recognised board. Moreover, admission to BTech at SITM is entrance-based. Students either need to qualify for national-level JEE Main or state-level Assam CEE exams. However, candidates can also appear for SITM entrance exam.

hostel_campus.college_name: Scholars Institute of Technology and Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus experience.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are very interactive and cooperative. College has Wi-Fi in every corner, making it easily accessible. Labs are beautiful and fully equipped, and the library has very knowledgeable and quality books. Classrooms are technically advanced with projectors. Hostel has a 24/7 facility electricity and water with average mess food and a shop for daily amenities. Medical first aid is available for students. Sports and games are available, including both indoor and outdoor activities.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities. Faculty members are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is one of the best when compared to other colleges in the region. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped, clean and have a good environment. Hostel rooms are spacious and are available on a single-sharing basis. Indoor sports facilities like table tennis, badminton, carrom board, etc., are also available. Gymnasiums are available in the hostel as well as in the college. A huge central library and Wi-Fi facility are also available.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best semi-government engineering colleges in NE India.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very good. It is neat and clean, and it is surrounded by lots of flowers. The library and the canteen are fabulous. There is a big playground, and the college is fully Wi-Fi enabled. All the labs are awesome. There's an auditorium, and there are also a library, e-library, canteen and admission cell in another building. The labs are currently based on the new inventions related to all the courses.

reviews.review_heading: Don't ruin and spoil your glorifying career by taking admission in these type of colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not worthy anyhow compared to semester fees our college takes per students. Here, classrooms lack whiteboard and projector facility to make understanding better. Wi-Fi is also present but only limited to the hostel area. Labs were equipped only with the outdated second-hand machines which fail to give accurate results, and that too only a few machines were present. Many times we have to manipulate the experimental results manually without doing practically due to unavailability...

reviews.review_heading: Think twice before you take admission in this type of college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, labs, classrooms and library facilities are good. But no medical facility was available in our college. In 1st and 2nd semester, we get canteen. After that, there is no canteen. We have to go to the hostel for our lunch. Food quality is average. Hostel rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Scholars Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also good except for the light facility. The corridor remains in dark or less light during college hours. We have two buildings and a boys' hostel. The 1st building is 1st class but the 2nd building is 2nd class. The first building is for faculty members and office and for 1st and 4rth years students. The second building is for 2nd and 3rd year students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am very proud of my university.

content.Placements: About 70-80 percent of students get placed in agricultural honours. Several co-operatives like IFFCO, PRADAN, and other companies are engaged in placements for students, and an affordable price is offered for graduate students. All students who are inspired to get a placement are interested in internship opportunities. The economics department offered several courses throughout the entire graduation program.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is installed in all labs, departments, and classrooms. So, there is no problem with any online work. All hostels are well accommodated, and the food is provided 3 times a day. The quality of food is good enough. Canteen, medical unit, sports, and games are available within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Uttar Banga Krishi Vishwavidyalaya at a Glance.

content.Placements: Around 30% to 40% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary varies from 7 to 10 LPA, and the lowest is 2-2.5 LPA. The average salary is 5-6 LPA for the maximum number of students. Pradan, IDBI Bank, Indorama, Sonalika International Tractors Limited, Axis Bank, Agrovet, and Tata Rallis are the top recruiting companies. Around 20-30% of students get internships at Pradan, fertilizer companies, Agri Inform, IIFC, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and lit classrooms are available. The hostel, mess, and canteen food are hygienic and good for health. All types of sports and games, both indoor and outdoor, are available here. Medical facilities are available, but in poor condition. They should be improved.

individual_reviews.title: The college campus is good.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is up to 8 to 12 students. The highest, the lowest, and the average packages are offered in our course. The highest is 4 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. Startup companies are the recruiters. 79% of students get internships. The roles offered are designer, constructor, and assistant director.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good, and the building infrastructure is also good. The environment and Wi-Fi signals are also good. Classrooms are clean, and the library is well-maintained. The hostel facilities are good, and the quality of the food is good compared to the canteen. The mess food is nice. All extracurricular activities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college as per my experience.

The average package is around 4-6LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, IBM, startups, and many more. Around 50% of students got internships in good companies. The top roles offered are software development, full stack, front end, and also back end, etc.

description: Janatha Education Trust'S Vivekananda Institute of Technology (VKIT) cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various UG and PG courses. Candidates can refer to the sections below to view the cutoff details for various accepting exams across different courses, rounds and categories. Further updates are below:

Janatha Education Trust'S Vivekananda Institute of Technology (VKIT) KCET cutoff 2025 has been closed for intake to B.E. / B.Tech and other courses. The cutoff was published for reserved and unreserved category students belonging to AI and HS quotas. For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the last round closing ranks were between 76493 and 243681 in the General category for the AI quota. Considering the ranks, the most challenging specialisation for admission was B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Machine

hostel_campus.college_name: Vivekananda Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, and the building infrastructure is also good. The environment and Wi-Fi signals are also good. Classrooms are clean, and the library is well-maintained. The hostel facilities are good, and the quality of the food is good compared to the canteen. The mess food is nice. All extracurricular activities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college as per my experience.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members are very good, and the infrastructure is too good. We have separate buildings for each domain, and with good, spacious classrooms and Wi-Fi facilities. The labs are also good. And we have a good, well-defined library where we get all the books and research papers. I am not in a hostel, but it was good as I hear. The canteen food is affordable and good; we get verification of food, and for sports, we have a big playground.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus with quality education.
reviews.review_text: The main reason for our college beauty is infrastructure; it is too good and very spacious. Classrooms and labs are also there with huge systems and Wi-Fi facilities. Basically, I am not staying in the hostel, but as friends said, the hostel facilities are good. The canteen food is amazing, and we also have a big playground to play indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college!
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in our college. VKIT campus is very nice. *Bus facility is very bad BMTC bus are very rare in this route, you have to wait for hours in bus stop. This is the big issue. At morning if you come to kumbalgoodu before 8:15 college bus will pick you. Classroom are decent but the buildings are very old. Library is outstanding. Reference section is available with lots of GATE preparation books and much more. Digital library provides a computer with Wi-Fi. Reading section is quite...

reviews.review_heading: Moderate college just to get degree certificate.
reviews.review_text: I am staying in hostel since first sem. Warden is okay. Hostel rooms are okay, two members in one room or single room available. No hot water supply but can have heater with you. Coming to main part is food is never good or healthy. They never make a tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has 24 acres of land. The hostel facilities are well maintained. The food served in the canteen is decent. Mess facility is also average. All facilities are great in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty nice from both inside and outside. All the equipment provided are latest and the library has more then enough books to read. Classrooms are also good. The college has provided hostel facilities and the rooms are good with proper food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are better. Infrastructure is pretty nice from the inside and outside. The equipment is the latest. Library has more books to read. Classrooms are also good to study. College has provided hostel facilities and the rooms are good. The food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Join the college its good.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are better then good and the infrastructure of the college is pretty nice from inside and outside and the equipment are latest and library has more then enough books to read. Classroom are also good to study. The college has provided hostel facilities and the rooms r good and the food is not that bad its good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, you can study here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty nice from the inside and outside. The equipment is the latest and the library has more than enough books to read. Classrooms are also good to study. The college has provided hostel facilities and the rooms are good and the food is not that bad it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Come join the college and know it your self.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are better then good and the infrastructure of the college is pretty nice from inside and outside and the equipment are the latest and library has more then enough books to read. Classroom are also good to study. The college has provided hostel facilities and the rooms r good and the food is not that bad its good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is so peaceful with a friendly HOD and professors.
reviews.review_text: I like the way they maintain the labs. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good and strictly-maintained college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good from the inside as well as the outside. The equipment is the latest, and the library has more than enough books to read. Classrooms are also good for studying. The college has provided hostel facilities, and the rooms are good. The food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good engineering college with all facilities included.
reviews.review_text: VKIT is located on the outskirts of Bangalore city surrounded by greenery. The College campus is huge consisting of 25 acres. Wi-Fi and E classroom facilities are included. Separate library block with a lot of books including Ebooks journals. The college has a separate hostel for boys and girls with good quality food from college mess. There is also a sports Complex for indoor games and cricket, football, volleyball court, etc., are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. All labs are well-equipped with modern instruments which are very useful for the students. The library has more than 6-8 types of books for one subject. The library contain more than 6,000 books.

college_info.college_name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Institute of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Institute of Technology Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.answer: A:    Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Institute of Technology has received an impressive review rating of 4 on Placements based on 3 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Institute of Technology provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Institute of Technology offers various programmes at UG and After 10th levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, IT & Software and Hospitality & Travel. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. On the other hand, at the After 10th level, the Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Institute of Technology offers After 10th Diploma. The fees for Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Institute of Technology courses is INR 42,083.

reviews_list.review_title: Average college for undergraduate study.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not offered here. After the completion of the course, students have to find jobs on their own. Most of the students opt for further studies. As I am in my in first year, I don't know much about the placement procedure. But I have heard from my seniors that placements are not there.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has good infrastructure and other facilities. We have organised classrooms, labs and a library. There are hostel facilities for both girls and boys. Both the genders have separate hostels. Food provided in the mess is of average quality. Wi-Fi is not for student's use.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good infrastructure, a very low fee structure, and affordable good placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students are placed. Every company where computers are used now needs computer engineers there is a demand for skilled hardware personality, and software knowledge personality so there is a maximum chance of placements. Around 60% of students get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: It provides Wi-Fi, laboratories, student information system, canteen, hostel, ccs, library, multipurpose hall, audio-video hall, and everything is provided. Medical facilities are available with an on-campus pharmacy. The sports and games are also conducted. W3 also has a multipurpose hall and is allowed to develop their skills in sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It's good for those people who want learn and do something in IT world.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% students have better future and top students have placement in tech Mahindra, hcl, Infosys and also in TCS. Before that in 5th semester our college gives us opportunity to go for industrial tour. Our lowest package is 20000-25000 and the highest package is 25000-40000.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good but in library the Wi-Fi is not working properly and our computer labs so good and clean actually the best part of our labs they teach us on the projector with animation effect. In my college we have a dress code because we don't want to compared any poor or rich students different.
